title: orthosiphon thymiflorus
intro: Orthosiphon thymiflorus, also known as Miswak or Java tea, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating urinary tract issues and reducing fever. The health benefits of Orthosiphon thymiflorus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce kidney stones, and alleviate symptoms of hypertension. Herbal preparations of Orthosiphon thymiflorus can be found in various forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
